products.title: GLCO X OLD PAL HAMPTON SUN
products.description: The second collaboration with our friends at Old Pal , the very purveyors of good herb, is a vision of hazy afternoons and easy vibes. We’re bringing back the classic, feel-good Hampton Sun — this time for the weed lovers, with a fresh Clover/Semi-Flat Palm colorway to spark things up. Roll them on, float through the day, soak up the sun, and let everything mellow out. From our original collection

products.title: GLCO X OLD PAL GILBERT SUN
products.description: GLCO x Old Pal Sun is a timeless silhouette inspired by the effortless style of times past. The slightly rounded square frame features our custom Droplet plaque, GLCO Cube filigree core wire and glass lenses. The dreamy combination of Sea Glass acetate frames and Pure Coffee glass lenses is sure to complete your vibe. The vision is simple: It's just weed, man. This collaboration is an ode to simpl

products.title: DÔEN BY GARRETT LEIGHT INGÉNUE SUN
products.description: A thicker, more expressive cat-eye with a slightly wider stance and a confident lift through the brow. The Ingénue leans into a classic vintage-inspired silhouette, with rounded edges and a sculptural front that feels bold yet controlled. The frame has more presence and curvature throughout, delivering a statement shape while maintaining balance and wearability. Crafted in acetate with considered

products.title: DÔEN BY GARRETT LEIGHT DOYENNE SUN
products.description: A refined, softly sculpted cat-eye with a subtle upward lift at the outer corners. The Doyenne features a balanced lens shape that’s gently rounded through the bottom with a clean, smooth brow line. The proportions feel compact and polished, offering a feminine silhouette that’s elevated yet easy to wear. Slim temples and a lightweight acetate construction create a comfortable, flattering fit desi

products.title: ALBRIGHT
products.description: Albright is a timeless unisex frame defined by a balanced silhouette and classic detailing. Designed for everyday wear, it features GLCO’s signature dual-plated rivet hinges with polished pins and original core wire, resulting in a clean, enduring profile that transcends seasons.

products.title: EARVIN SUN
products.description: Earvin Sun takes us back with a classic, strong silhouette. Its oversized square lenses and keyhole bridge offer presence with comfort. Available in polar lens options. 100% UV protection.

products.title: PARKMAN
products.description: Parkman is a classic large-frame silhouette with strong, masculine proportions. Designed with a structured temple and enduring shape, it features GLCO’s signature dual-plated rivet hinges with polished pins and original core wire, resulting in a bold yet timeless profile built for everyday wear.

products.title: EMBURY
products.description: Embury is a refined acetate frame with soft, tailored lines and a subtle saddle bridge. Rounded in classic GLCO construction, it features dual-plated rivet hinges with polished pins and original core wire, bringing quiet structure to a versatile, unisex silhouette.

products.title: PALMERA SUN
products.description: Palmera Sun is a bold, oversized silhouette with sculpted topline angles and sharp beveling that gives the frame its striking edge. Designed in fresh tones, this acetate style balances graphic volume with refined detailing. 100% UV protection.

products.title: MARIPOSA
products.description: Mariposa is an oversized hexagon frame with a bold, feminine silhouette that stands out with intention. Sculpted angles meet generous proportions, while GLCO’s dual-plated rivet hinges, polished pins, and classic core wire ground the design in signature craftsmanship. Confident, clean, and built to be noticed.

products.title: LAURICE SUN
products.description: Laurice Sun pairs soft curves with sculpted volume for a bold, polished silhouette. Triple pin detailing adds a flash of shine, while gradient lenses and rich acetate colors bring layered dimension. 100% UV protection.

products.title: WELLS J SUN
products.description: A refined metal silhouette with thoughtful detailing, Wells J Sun balances modern proportion with subtle craftsmanship. Designed in lightweight titanium, the frame features a distinctive half double-rim construction that adds dimension without visual weight. Sculpted bridge and temple details are finished with delicate floral filigree, offering a quiet, subtle design detail. Finished with pure gla

products.title: OCAMPO SUN
products.description: Ocampo Sun is a round metal frame reimagined with a removable side-shield clip-on that delivers both utility and edge. Detailed with art deco etching across the bridge and shield, the step-up end piece and enamel-coated components add a subtle sculptural dimension. Built with titanium screw-in nose pads and acetate temple tips. 100% UV protection.

products.title: ALTA SUN
products.description: Alta Sun is an oversized, angled aviator crafted entirely from lightweight titanium. Featuring a distinctive double bridge, sculpted end pieces, and clean temple design, it balances bold proportions with precision detailing. Screw-in titanium nose pads provide comfort and stability. 100% UV protection.

products.title: ALMA J
products.description: Alma J Soft is a soft half-rim optical hexagon frame. Crafted with brushed and antiqued metal plating for a subtly worn finish, the frame is finished with a woodgrain filigree temple and adjustable nose pads, creating a refined balance of structure and ease with a distinctly architectural profile.

products.title: LACHMAN SUN
products.description: Lachman Sun is a tailored unisex frame with a smooth saddle bridge and subtle angular detailing along the top line. Clean-lined and versatile, it features GLCO’s signature dual-plated rivet hinges with polished pins and classic original core wire, bringing modern structure to a familiar silhouette.100% UV protection.

products.title: TEMESCAL SUN
products.description: Temescal Sun is a hexagon frame with intriguing angles and a clean silhouette. Fitted with GLCO’s dual-plated rivet hinges, polished pins, and original core wire, it is paired with pure glass lenses. 100% UV protection.

products.title: MCNALLY SUN
products.description: McNally Sun is a modern brow-line aviator with soft curves and a subtle lift. Detailed with polished vertical pins and GLCO’s classic dual-plated rivet hinges and core wire. 100% UV protection.

products.title: DOC
products.description: Doc combines a classic silhouette with easy to wear colorways. Its commanding double bridge and large frame stand out, finished with GLCO temple ball and pins for a distinctive touch.

products.title: GALLOWAY
products.description: Galloway is a vintage-inspired soft angular frame defined by soft proportions and a refined silhouette. Designed with a tapered paddle temple, it features GLCO’s signature dual-plated rivet hinges with polished pins and classic original core wire, resulting in a timeless shape with understated character.

products.title: LOMA
products.description: Loma is a vintage-inspired round frame with a compact silhouette and clean curvature. Featuring GLCO’s signature dual-plated rivet hinges with polished pins and original core wire, it’s finished with a tapered paddle temple that brings a subtle structural detail to this classically proportioned design.

products.title: LACHMAN
products.description: Lachman is a tailored unisex frame with a sculpted saddle bridge and subtle angular detailing along the top line. Clean-lined and versatile, it features GLCO’s signature dual-plated rivet hinges with polished pins and classic original core wire, bringing modern structure to a familiar silhouette.

products.title: OVERSIZED CLEANING CLOTH
products.description: Oversized microfiber cleaning cloth in seasonal colors and prints. Designed for daily use, with extra surface area to easily clean lenses and frames. It's made to live in your bag, car, or case — always within reach. **Please note, this item is Final Sale

products.description: Teaming up for a second time with Montreal-based curator of timeless design, JJJJound, we have created a limited edition Brooks in a custom Matte Bottle Glass Brown colorway. products.title: GLCO X JJJJOUND SUN

products.description: We proudly present the GLCOzzy Collection - an exclusive collaboration with Ozzy Osbourne, celebrating his timeless legacy and unmatched cultural impact. products.description: We proudly present the GLCOzzy Collection - an exclusive collaboration with Ozzy Osbourne, celebrating his timeless legacy and unmatched cultural impact. products.title: BENNETT S
products.description: A bold titanium double-bridge aviator, Bennet S features a perforated double eye rim, dual-tonal plating, and new Floral Filigree detailing. Finished with Select Glass lenses and screw-in titanium nose pads for all-day comfort.

products.title: ADONIS C
products.description: Adonis C arrives as the thinner version of the beloved Adonis S for a more lightweight fit. This evolution introduces a newly designed eyelet core wire filigree and temple tip decal, adding subtle artistry to its structure. Classic ML front geo plaques anchor the design in timeless craftsmanship, while two new rich acetate colorways — Serpentine and Cognac Tortoise — bring depth and distinction to

products.title: GIDEON C
products.description: A modern angled square frame, Gideon C features titanium hinges, a new combination temple design, and signature Eyelet temple tip detailing and finished with acetate nose pads and elongated temple tips. Gideon C reimagines modern minimalism through a timeless lens.

products.title: SUMNER C
products.description: A vintage-inspired combination frame, Sumner C features a titanium bridge, acetate-embedded hinges, and a new combination temple design. Finished with elongated acetate temple tips and the signature Eyelet decal this frame is a standout classic reimagined for today.

products.title: ROLAND S
products.description: Roland S is a bold large rectangle sun style, crafted for a statement-making fit. Vertical front Vintage Diamond Plaques highlight its heritage inspiration, while the new Eyelet temple tip decals add a refined signature detail. Designed with an extended temple length, Roland S ensures balance, comfort, and presence for those who prefer a larger frame.

products.title: CLARK J CLIP
products.description: All-metal, non-folding clip with Wave Filigree detailing on the outer eyerim, designed for Clark J frames. Pairs with CLARK J eyeglasses. Frame sold separately.

products.title: BENNY J SUN
products.description: Benny J Sun feature an all-titanium metal frame, combining premium craftsmanship with elevated design. A vintage-inspired bridge, top bar, and temple design are enhanced with intricate Fern filigree etching, adding a touch of refinement. Paired with Premium Glass semi-flat lenses and 100% UV protection.

products.title: HARDING II CLIP
products.description: A metal sun flip clip for the Harding II frame, offered in timeless color combinations. Pairs with HARDING II eyeglasses. Frame sold separately.

products.title: EVAN
products.description: Evan is a timeless, compact frame designed for those who appreciate understated elegance. Featuring dual-plated rivet hinges, polished pins, and signature core wire.

products.title: CLUNE J CLIP
products.description: Elevated, non-folding clip with an inside windsor eyerim for a refined acetate detail, compatible with Clune J and Clune 47 optical frames. Pairs with Clune J and Clune 47 . Frame sold separately.

products.title: BROOKS SUN
products.description: From our original collection, a bestselling square shaped acetate style with a defined keyhole shape in a wide range of acetates.

products.title: JESS SUN
products.description: Jess Sun is an oversized cat-eye frame with a bold, upswept silhouette and sculpted browline. Detailed with the Marquis Plaque at the temple and finished with lenses offering 100% UV protection.

products.title: HARDING SUN
products.description: A GLCO icon, this masculine, retro-influenced sunglass features a prominent single bridge, bold acetate front, and Premium Glass Semi-Flat lenses with 100% UV protection. Detailed with metal plaques and a keyhole bridge.

products.title: EVAN SUN
products.description: Evan Sun is a compact, square-round frame with balanced proportions and a versatile fit. Designed with dual-plated rivet hinges, polished pins, and a signature core wire for added strength and detail. Finished with lenses offering 100% UV protection.

products.title: CASILLAS SUN
products.description: Casillas Sun is a unisex classic with a subtle teardrop lens shape and balanced proportions. Designed with dual-plated rivet hinges, vertical polished pins, and a signature core wire for added structure. Finished with paddle temples for a secure, comfortable fit and lenses offering 100% UV protection.

products.title: ALPER SUN
products.description: Alper Sun is a retro-inspired oval frame crafted in metal with an acetate insert for added structure and depth. The design is anchored by a Fern filigree bridge, grooved endpieces, and temples with integrated spring hinges for a flexible, secure fit. Adjustable nose pads provide comfort, while the lenses deliver 100% UV protection.

products.title: ZAC
products.description: Zac offers a fresh, slimmer profile with a refined take on a classic square shape. The softly rounded edges and balanced proportions give it a versatile fit, while the Skyline plaque at the temple adds a subtle signature detail. Finished with slim facet temples for a modern look and comfortable wear.

products.title: STANTON
products.description: Stanton is a larger, deeper silhouette with a rounded-square shape that offers a bold yet versatile look. Designed with dual-plated rivet hinges, polished pins, and classic core wire.

products.title: LINNIE
products.description: A best-selling, smaller rounded aviator with reverse Windsor rims, coin-edge filigree, and combination metal and acetate temples in complementary finishes.

products.title: KAISER
products.description: Kaiser features a bold hexagon metal frame designed with titanium screw-in nose pads for a secure, comfortable fit. The elevated step-down end piece and matching step-down combination temple design add a refined touch, creating a distinctive and elevated look.

products.title: HARDING II
products.description: A refreshed icon, the Harding II brings a contemporary twist to one of our beloved best-sellers. Featuring a thinner frame design, this revival stays true to our GLCO heritage with classic dual-plated rivet hinges, polished pins, and the original core wire, ensuring timeless durability and sophisticated craftsmanship. For instant shade pair with HARDING II CLIP

products.description: Reintroducing a top-seller, the Cloy II is a round metal frame. Featuring titanium screw-in nose pads for a precise and comfortable fit, this refreshed style combines innovative design with classic craftsmanship. The tapered end piece adds a bold, modern touch, while the step-down combination temple design brings a refined, structured look.

products.title: CLARK J
products.description: An elevated version of the best-selling Clark, meticulously crafted with exclusive acetate colors and luxurious metal accents. products.title: GLCO X WILL BRYANT GLASSWARE SET
products.description: Partnering with artist and longtime friend, Will Bryant, we present our collection of items rooted in our friendship. On our glassware set, playful forms in bright hues create a pattern that gives the illusion of creating sound — little bangs and boops as the shapes crash and slide within itself. The perfect way to cheers a friendship.

products.title: GLCO x KING KENNEDY CLIP
products.description: A metal folding sun clip made special for our GLCO x KING KENNEDY frame, available in one unique colorway that pairs perfectly with all metal tones. Frame sold separately. Also pairs with Wilson, Wilson M, Wilson M II and Wilson T eyeglasses.

products.description: GLCO x KING KENNEDY Sun is a classic Wilson frame reimagined in colors and materials inspired by King Kennedy’s one-of-a-kind approach to reworking antique and rare handwoven rugs. Premium acetate inserts and temples add an element of color and substance. Complete with 100% UV protection.

products.title: DORIAN C
products.description: Dorian C features a sophisticated oval shape with a distinguished, angled acetate top line, creating a striking yet refined silhouette. products.title: ACE II SUN
products.description: A larger fit of our classic Ace Sun with updated details. Featuring bold lines and fine details, the Ace II is for the strong and not-so-silent types. Includes Premium Glass lenses and UV protection.

products.title: WILLIAM
products.description: The William is a shallower, teardrop-shaped, P3 metal optical frame. Offering a refined take on classic style, William is equipped with intricate new bridge filigree and end piece detailing, plus all-metal temples. Screw-in titanium nose pads ensure a perfect fit. For instant shade, pair with the William Clip .

products.title: PATRICK
products.description: The Patrick is a sleek, flat-topped P3 all-metal frame, showcasing a refined coin-edge detail along the eye wire and intricate new filigree on the endpieces. The all-metal temples and screw-in titanium nose pads offer both durability and comfort. Available in a selection of our most popular classic plating colors.

products.title: MARKUS
products.description: Markus is a unisex, classic soft square frame that defines understated style. With its thin, lightweight construction and timeless design, it offers a notable shape crafted with precision. Refined details boasts a modern yet enduring charm, featured with a keyhole bridge, two front horizontal pins, and five-barrel hinges for enhanced durability and precision.

products.title: CARINA
products.description: Blending ultra-thin acetate with an oversized, feminine square shape, Carina is equal parts bold and tailored. Featuring GLCO’s classic dual-plated rivet hinges, two front horizontal pins, and the signature original core wire.

products.title: WILSON X SUN
products.description: The best-selling Wilson reimagined with a thicker insert. Featuring a refined end piece filigree and a thicker, sculpted temples. Equipped with screw-in titanium nose pads for added comfort and 100% UV protection.

products.title: JULIEN SUN
products.description: Julien Sun is a retro-inspired round acetate frame with a smooth, bubbly profile, echoing the bold style of the 60s. Its rounded endpieces and unique half-circle temples create a distinctive, playful look that blends vintage charm with contemporary flair. The frame is paired with 2B lenses for added style and function. Featuring GLCO's signature dual-plated rivet hinges, polished pins, and classic

products.title: AGNES SUN
products.description: Agnes Sun is an oversized, retro-inspired 70s square acetate frame that exudes minimal yet bold femininity with gradient lenses. Finished with GLCO’s signature dual-plated rivet hinges, polished pins, and classic original core wire. Complete with UV protection.

products.title: MORNINGSIDE M SUN
products.description: The Morningside M Sun takes our oversized round style to the next level with a sleek metal frame. It features an ultra-thin design, Braid endpiece, coin edge eye rim filigree, titanium nose pads, and 100% UV protection for a strong build and fit.

products.title: EUREKA M SUN
products.description: Eureka M Sun boasts a robust eyewire frame with a sleek, modern fit. It showcases an angled P3 shape with a subtle flat top, Braid endpiece, and titanium nose pads. The frame includes Premium Glass lenses and offers 100% UV protection.

products.description: This timeless, softly squared metal frame features an ultra-thin, lightweight design. Engineered for both durability and precision, it offers a perfect balance of strength and comfort. Cascade M Sun includes custom filigree Sun endpieces, coin edge eye rim filigree, with Premium Glass lenses. Ideal for a modern, understated look.

Our titanium frames are designed for lasting comfort and an extra lightweight feel, providing exceptional strength-to-weight ratio that maintains durability without ad

products.title: WILSON M II
products.description: Wilson M II is an updated version of the metal Wilson M, featuring custom Sun end piece filigree and an ultra-thin metal temple with titanium nose pads. For instant shade, pair with the Wilson Clip .

products.title: MORNINGSIDE M
products.description: The refined metal version of our oversized round style. Morningside M features an ultra-thin metal frame, Braid endpiece, coin edge eye rim filigree, and titanium nose pads, for a lasting build and fit.

products.title: CASCADE T
products.description: Cascade T, expertly crafted in titanium, features a timeless, soft-squared metal frame with an ultra-thin, lightweight design. Includes custom etched Sun endpieces, coin edge eye rim filigree and all-metal temples. Our titanium frames are designed for lasting comfort a

products.title: CASCADE M
products.description: Cascade M is a timeless, soft-squared metal frame with an ultra-thin, lightweight design. Engineered for durability and precision, this frame offers a balanced blend of strength and comfort. Includes custom etched Sun endpieces, coin edge eye rim filigree and all-metal temples. Ideal for a modern, understated look. For instant shade, pair with the CASCADE CLIP .

products.title: CASCADE CLIP
products.description: Classic GL folding sun clip for all Cascade styles in universal colors. Pair with CASCADE M or CASCADE T eyeglasses.

products.title: PURVEYOR S
products.description: Purveyor S boasts a bold, masculine frame with a sculpted, beveled design and a wide rectangular shape that commands attention. It features Cartography core wire filigree and a triple hex plaque on the temples. Equipped with Select Glass lenses and 100% UV protection, this frame combines striking style with exceptional functionality.

products.title: JAMES S
products.description: The Mr. Leight interpretation of a classic style made flawless. James S features subtle angles along the top-line and our Geo plaque to give a distinguished feel to an otherwise classic frame. Featuring our custom Topography engraved metal core wire, Select Glass lenses and 100% UV protection.

products.title: SURVEYOR C
products.description: Surveyor C is a large, rectangular acetate frame with a bold bridge and endpieces. Classic and retro, this ultra masculine design combines strong lines with timeless style and includes a saddle bridge with Cartography core wire filigree and tripe hex plaques.

products.title: LUCKMAN C
products.description: Luckman C is a classic mid-century P3 frame with a high keyhole bridge and gracefully sloping end pieces. Adorned with City Scape filigree and Geo temple plaques, it embodies an enduring and timeless design.

products.title: LUCKMAN S
products.description: Luckman S is a classic mid-century P3 frame with a high keyhole bridge and gracefully sloping end pieces. Adorned with City Scape filigree and Geo temple plaques, it embodies an enduring and timeless design with 100% UV protection and Select Glass lenses.

products.title: COOPERS S
products.description: A quintessential semi-square frame with a keyhole bridge, featuring custom titanium details and polarized lens options for a style that's modern yet timeless.

products.title: ARCHIVIST C
products.description: Archivist C is a turn-of-the-century antique frame with a softly P3 lens that contrasts with the angular acetate rim. Featuring a tailored design with exquisite details. Diamond filigree accents are added to the bridge and end pieces for a touch of elegance.

products.title: LANGLEY CLIP
products.description: A metal sun flip clip for the Langley frame, offered in timeless color combinations. Frame sold separately. Pair with Langley eyeglasses.

products.title: HAMPTON X
products.description: As a nod to our beginnings, we redesigned the Hampton, our first and bestselling frame from our original collection. With a thicker acetate construction and glass lenses it's a bold, statement-making silhouette with a classic feel.

products.title: CLUNE X
products.description: Clune X is our mid-century-inspired, ever-popular Clune frame reimagined. This P3 inspired frame presents a thicker acetate than its namesake featuring our classic GLCO corewire and double pins at the endpiece.

products.title: WHITNEY
products.description: Whitney is a feminine, square design with an oversized fit. Thin and lightweight for effortless wear, the frame is constructed with a 5-barrel hinge and saddle nose bridge.

products.title: LANGLEY
products.description: Langley is a large frame with medium thickness, merging retro and classic design elements with a modern twist. Equipped with an angular keyhole nose bridge detailing, two front vertical pins, and five-barrel hinges for enhanced durability and precision. For instant shade, pair with the LANGLEY CLIP .

products.title: MORNINGSIDE X SUN
products.description: The amplified version of our oversized round style made to match the X-series. Morningside X Sun is a thicker acetate edition, providing a bolder look while maintaining the same stylish and timeless design. Featuring a keyhole bridge, five barrel hinge and 100% UV protection.

products.title: EL CAPITAN SUN
products.description: El Capitan Sun is a large, rectangular aviator with refined proportions and classic details. It features custom metallic Mountain Range etching on the temple tips, titanium nose pads for enhanced comfort and durability and 100% UV protection.

products.title: THOMPSON SUN
products.description: Thompson Sun is a cat-eye design with significant lift, featuring a classic yet distinctive silhouette. This larger, flattering frame boasts an upswept brow line, a custom interior Mountain core wire, triple endpiece pins and 100% UV protection.

products.title: SIERRA SUN
products.description: Sierra Sun is a retro cat eye with softly curved bevels, geometric temple and charming colors. Featuring a custom interior Mountain core wire filigree, triple temple pins and 100% UV protection.

products.title: KINNEY II SUN
products.description: A thicker version of our forever classic, Kinney Sun. Kinney II Sun maintains the same classic proportions and flattering shape with 2 pins and Premium Glass, offering a formidable take on a timeless design. 100% UV protection.

products.title: GLCO SPORTS NETWORK HAT
products.description: GLCO Shake and Bake Sports Network 5-panel hat, featuring a snapback closure.

products.title: CARROL
products.description: With its oversized retro silhouette, Carrol brings a classic vintage shape into modern times. A subtle upward slope at the end pieces creates the appearance of lift, infusing the design with a gentle femininity. Featuring a 5-barrel hinge and a saddle nose bridge.

products.title: RELL S
products.description: With its unconventional silhouette, Rell is a nod to the nonconforming spirit of mid-20th century musicians and artists. A geometrical silhouette is enhanced with striking color and lens pairings in addition to new filigree artwork on the core wire. Fish Hook metal decals on the outer temples and Mr. Leight Select Glass lenses complete the frame.

products.title: GETTY C
products.description: The Getty Center is an iconic museum overlooking Los Angeles. Designed by Richard Meier, it is known for its modernist architecture, curvilinear features and beautiful gardens. It houses the art and antiquities of oil magnate J. Paul Getty, once the richest man in the world and a symbol of the jetsetting lifestyle. The frame's design is a timeless silhouette inspired by the rich acetate styles of

products.title: RELL II C
products.description: With its unconventional silhouette, Rell II C is a nod to the nonconforming spirit of mid-20th century musicians and artists. A geometrical silhouette is softened by our signature thin acetate construction for an overall ease of wear. Featuring our custom Lava Nouveau engraved metal core wire and custom engraved hinge with enamel filled Mr. Leight logo cap.

products.title: MANA C
products.description: Mana C is a structured, feminine-square frame with a bold brow line for understated modernity. Featuring our custom Spearhead engraved metal core wire, custom engraved hinge with enamel filled Mr. Leight logo cap and a Saddle nose bridge.

products.title: JAMES C
products.description: The Mr. Leight interpretation of a classic style made flawless. James C features subtle angles along the top-line and our Geo plaque to give a distinguished feel to an otherwise classic frame. Featuring our custom Topography engraved metal core wire, custom engraved hinge with enamel filled Mr. Leight logo cap and a metal temple tip.

products.title: MAVEN S
products.description: Maven S is a modern executive style frame sculpted out of 10mm acetate for material depth, without sacrificing comfort. Featuring our custom Topography engraved metal core wire, custom engraved hinge with enamel filled Mr. Leight logo cap and 100% UV protection.

products.title: HAMPTON CLIP M
products.description: Give your Hampton frames a second life with our sunglass clips. Now available in new, super-versatile, wearable colors that pair well with any Hampton in any size. Frame sold separately. Pair with Hampton eyeglasses.

products.title: KENNEDY S
products.description: With a distinguished, round silhouette, the Kennedy S offers everyday polish for the casual wearer. Made of premium acetate that's specially milled using an architectural bevel technique, which results in beautiful depth of color—with a two-tone effect in select color ways—making each frame an example of true artistry.

products.title: WORLD SUN
products.description: The sleek, square-shaped silhouette of the World sunglass belies the utter functionality of its design. With all-metal construction, an intricate coin-edge eyewire pattern, and acetate temple tips, this lightweight frame is crafted for maximum style and comfort. World is the sunglass of choice for the individual who's always on the move, who demands a sharp capsule wardrobe as fluid and adaptable

products.title: KINNEY
products.description: One of our Forever Classics, Kinney boasts a simple yet classic silhouette that's designed to suit everyone. Featuring a semi-square shape with balanced proportions and a keyhole bridge. For instant shade, pair with the Kinney Clip .

products.title: GRANT M
products.description: An updated version of our previous bestseller, the Grant M features a thin, enamel-painted, all-metal eyewire for enhanced comfort, performance, and fit. Simple filigree details add subtle interest to this minimal, square frame.

products.title: SHERWOOD SUN
products.description: The Sherwood Sun is a compact, tailored square frame taking design notes from classic 50's eyewear. This frame features a thicker acetate, a custom Braid filigree core wire, and our custom Skyline plaque. 100% UV Protection.

products.title: ALDER
products.description: A larger frame for a refined, scholarly look. The Alder features a custom Palm print filagree core wire, Zenith plaques on the temple, and dual-plated real rivet hinges with external pins.

products.title: CYPRUS SUN
products.description: The Cyprus Sun is a modern take on a classic shape. Featuring a bubble-like beveling, vintage browline and a custom Mountain filagree core wire. 100% UV Protection.

products.title: MANZANITA
products.description: The Manzanita is a classic P3 with an uplifted endpiece for a soft, easy wear. Featuring a custom Braid filigree core wire, 5-barrel hinge and a keyhole nose bridge.

products.title: SHERWOOD CLIP
products.description: A folding sunglass clip created for the Sherwood, available in both sizes. FRAME sold separately.

products.title: SHERWOOD
products.description: The Sherwood is a compact, tailored square frame taking design notes from classic 50's eyewear. This frame features a thicker acetate, a custom Braid filigree core wire, and our custom Skyline plaque. For instant shade, pair with the SHERWOOD CLIP .

products.title: WILSHIRE
products.description: The Wilshire is a sophisticated, soft square frame composed of a thin and light weight Cured Cellulose Acetate. Featuring a custom Braid filigree core wire, 5-barrel hinge and a keyhole nose bridge. If you’re fan of our classic Kinney this is a nice addition to your eyewear collection.

products.title: VAN BUREN II SUN
products.description: Our r einvention of the aviator with a single top bar and ultra-modern flat premium glass lenses. Featuring a lightweight metal frame, BPA-free adjustable nose pads and 100% UV protection.

products.title: MORNINGSIDE SUN
products.description: The Morningside Sun is an oversized round frame, inspired by the 80's, in our ultra-thin acetate. The chic rounded frames come in colorful pastel and classic colorways paired with semi-flat colored lenses.

products.title: WILSON M SUN
products.description: Wilson M Sun is the metal version of our iconic round sunglass, the Wilson Sun. Available in a range of metal tones and lens colors, there's a shade for everyone.

products.title: HAMPTON X SUN
products.description: In a nod to our beginnings, we redesigned the Hampton, our first and bestselling frame from our original collection 10 years ago. With a thicker acetate construction, Premium Glass lenses, and a special plaque inspired by the GLCO logo, it's a bold, statement-making silhouette.

products.title: BROOKS X SUN
products.description: One of our best-selling designs from our first-ever collection, the Brooks is back in honor of our 10th anniversary. Redesigned with a thicker acetate construction and a new plaque inspired by the GLCO logo, its classic facade is infused with a hint of bookish charm. To commemorate our 10th anniversary, the re-envisioned Brooks will come with an exclusive anniversary-edition soft case, case wrappe

products.title: BENTLEY
products.description: Our bestselling oversized men's style, distinguished by the widest nose bridge in our collection. Bentley is tailored for wide faces and includes a saddle nose bridge for superior comfort and support.

products.title: BENTLEY SUN
products.description: Bentley Sun is a classic, oversized masculine frame, distinguished by the widest nose bridge in our collection. It’s tailored for wide faces and includes a saddle nose bridge for superior comfort and features 100% UV protection.

products.title: WILSON SUN
products.description: The Wilson Sun has reached cult-status and it's no surprise why. Inspired by John Lennon, these metal Windsor rim sunglasses complement a wide range of styles and are available in semi-flat glass, standard base, or pure glass lenses, in two sizes.

products.title: HAYES SUN
products.description: A perfectly proportioned frame that includes an assemblage of our classic design elements. Inspired by the classic wayfarer style from the 60’s this thin, lightweight frame features our custom GLCO graphic print double pressed core wire, 5-barrel hinge and saddle nose bridge.

products.title: DEAN S
products.description: Dean S is the gold standard of eyewear, combining a handsome silhouette with exquisite detailing. It elevates a classic silhouette with meticulously crafted details. Custom designed filigree and decals line the core wire and temple tips, while vintage diamond plaques adorn the end pieces.

products.title: CARLTON
products.description: Slim, classic, and lightweight, the Carlton is designed with a keyhole bridge and new medium fit to provide extra versatility. Made from our new bio-based acetate, the Carlton features distinctive raised rivet pins along the end pieces—a signature of our sustainable collection.

products.title: DEVON C
products.description: The soft square and high keyhole bridge of the Devon brings to mind two powerfully evocative characters. It’s both the quirky librarian who never shushed us (and in fact, we would trade book and movie recommendations with) and the Art Archivist who received their PH.D from Rhode Island School of Design with the sole yearning to spend quiet time alone with artwork – both based on real people. The D

products.title: HACHI II C
products.description: A slightly larger lens for a more wearable, everyday bookish feel. The minimalism of this P3 frame is maintained with a lighter acetate while three dimensional filigree provides a subtle flair. It references Ivy League fashions, constructed with sculpted beta-titanium in a range of finishes.

products.title: NAPLES SUN
products.description: With rich materials and a bold silhouette, the Naples frame infuses a modern design with vintage sensibility. Palm leaf plaques embellish the exaggerated endpieces for a look that's equal parts minimal and striking.

products.title: CLUBHOUSE II SUN
products.description: Our classic metal style, Clubhouse, is updated with premium details for considered comfort and elevated style. The end pieces are finely engraved with a custom sun design and new acetate is added to the temple for comfort and weight distribution.

products.title: ACE II
products.description: Our cult-favorite Ace Sun transformed into an optical. Ace II reflects the standard way in which we design and create premium eyewear. We’re not reinventing the wheel here – just putting some rims on ‘em.

products.title: FRANKLIN
products.description: It’s a familiar shape with new things. The bridge is lowered to sit snugly along your nose contour. Soft and delicate with no hard edges, it’s a new friend from the same place.

products.title: GLCO X MASSIMO ALBA HANDKERCHIEF
products.description: Italian charm with our signature California ease, GLCO x Massimo is season-less, emotionally-provoking, quietly elegant. For those who seek pleasure in the authentic. Our GLCO x Massimo Alba collection is handmade in small batches by expert craftspeople. Each piece is unique and may contain slight differentiations. Perfection is not a mark of quality, beauty. Perfection is not authentic. Perfectio

products.title: BRISTOL C
products.description: A celebration of artistic prowess, Bristol C highlights this season's custom artwork with brilliant filigree. Its rounded silhouette is accented with a thin acetate insert around the lens, while striking engravings illuminate its metal pieces. Bristol is finished with tonal nose pads for a cushioned fit.

products.title: MAVERICK S
products.description: Sleek contours and intricate detailing illuminate this crisp, modern executive sun frame. Defined by its clean lines and rounded topline, Maverick is our crisp and modern executive sun frame. Signature Mr. Leight triple hex plaque and titanium flex coil adorn the temples along with a Snakeskin filigree on the corewire. Maverick is complete with premium Mr. Leight Select Glass lenses.

products.title: DEAN C
products.description: Dean C is the gold standard of eyewear, combining a handsome silhouette with exquisite detailing. Its classic silhouette is elevated with custom designed filigree and decals along the core wire and temple tips. Vintage diamond plaques adorn the end pieces for a finishing touch.

products.title: BROOKS II SUN
products.description: From our original collection, our bestselling square-shaped acetate style is updated with new custom leaf plaque detailing and premium glass lenses for prime clarity.

products.title: HERCULES
products.description: Hercules is a rounded frame with flared end pieces that nods to the signature frames worn by the artists of 60's and 70's. Comfort was carefully considered in the design of this frame, with a keyhole nose bridge and temple design to provide a better distribution of weight. The Hercules is finished with a Skyline plaque and features our custom GLCO Cube filigree corewire.

products.title: CLUBHOUSE II
products.description: Our classic metal style, Clubhouse, is updated with premium details for considered comfort and elevated style. The end pieces are finely engraved with a custom sun design and new acetate is added to the temple for comfort and weight distribution. The Gold colorway includes specialty bi-colored plating.

products.title: GILBERT
products.description: Gilbert is a timeless silhouette inspired by the effortless style of the 50's. The slightly rounded square frame features a custom plaque and a new temple design for better comfort and weight distribution.

products.title: CLUNE X SUN
products.description: Clune X Sun is our mid-century-inspired, ever-popular Clune frame reimagined. This P3 inspired frame presents a thicker acetate than its namesake. Additional enhancements include Premium Glass lenses, our classic GLCO corewire and double pins at the end piece. 100% UV protection.

products.title: NOVARRO S
products.description: The Novarro is a true mark of craftsmanship. With perforated designs at the metal eye rim and custom filigree on the end pieces, this oversized, square aviator features a metal top bar for additional structure and our signature titanium eye wire around the lenses. 100% UV protection.

products.title: MARMONT II S
products.description: The Chateau Marmont is a Hollywood landmark on Sunset Boulevard long frequented by film stars and rock stars. Its storied register of immortal guests has inspired a rich mythology around the hotel and inspired innumerable songs, films and works of literature. The frame's design was inspired by classic silhouettes and the acetate styles of Old Hollywood. Its timeless P3 shape and titanium construct

products.title: HARD CASE
products.description: Standard GLCO hard case available in multiple material options and colors. GLCO cleaning cloth included. This item is final sale.

products.title: EARVIN
products.description: Earvin takes us back with a classic, strong silhouette. An oversized, square lens is coupled with a keyhole bridge for lightweight comfort. Made from our bio-based and biodegradable green-acetate, the Earvin features distinctive raised rivet pins along the endpieces and CR39 lenses.

products.title: DOTTIE SUN
products.description: The Dottie is an updated cat eye taking inspiration from LA's new wave pop-punk scene. Designed with a thick acetate, larger fit, and offered in new, ultra-glam colorways, the Dottie is all about attitude.

products.title: FLIPPER SUN
products.description: Flipper Sun features a thick, super round frame with flared endpieces, creating a bold silhouette. Available in contrasting pop colors, it includes Premium Glass Lenses and our signature GLCO water drop plaque. 100% UV protection.

products.title: DOC SUN
products.description: Doc Sun combines a classic silhouette with bold colorways. Its commanding double bridge and large frame stand out, finished with GLCO temple ball and pins for a distinctive touch and 100% UV protection.

products.title: KENNEDY C
products.description: With a distinguished, round silhouette, the Kennedy C offers everyday polish for the casual wearer. Made of premium acetate that's specially milled using an architectural bevel technique, which results in beautiful depth of color—with a two-tone effect in select color ways—making each frame an example of true artistry.

products.title: BILLIE C
products.description: With its refined silhouette, Billie offers everyday polish for the casual sartorialist. Mixed-materials create an unexpected, tactile quality to this frame: titanium eye wire is finished with filigree detailing along the bridge, temple, and end pieces. Premium acetate inserts and temples add an element of color and substance. The Billie is finished with adjustable titanium nose pads, covered in cl

products.title: GETTY II S
products.description: The Getty Center is an iconic museum overlooking Los Angeles. Designed by Richard Meier, it is known for its modernist architecture, curvilinear features and beautiful gardens. It houses the art and antiquities of oil magnate J. Paul Getty, once the richest man in the world and a symbol of the jetsetting lifestyle. The frame's design is a timeless silhouette inspired by the rich acetate styles of

products.title: BROADWAY SUN
products.description: Broadway Sun offers an updated wayfarer style with some throwback putting- green inspiration. Designed with contoured temples to mimic 50s car fins, its dimensions are slightly larger than its predecessors. Finished with water-drop plaques along the endpieces and semi-flat lenses. 100% UV protection.

products.title: CARLTON SUN
products.description: Slim, classic, and lightweight, the Carlton is designed with a keyhole bridge and new medium fit to provide extra versatility. Made from our new bio-based acetate, the Carlton features distinctive raised rivet pins along the end pieces—a signature of our sustainable collection.

products.title: EL REY
products.description: El Rey brings a new attitude to the classic cat eye by adding squared off details and sleek temple construction.

products.title: COLLECTOR'S CASE
products.description: Take your favorite GLCO frames wherever you go with our Collector's Case. With a dual zip-around closure, the Collector's Case makes it easy to travel in style, holding up to four frames in softly lined compartments.

products.title: WILSON CLIP
products.description: A metal folding sun clip for our iconic Wilson frames, available in classic color combinations to complement any pairing. Frame sold separately. Pairs with Wilson, Wilson M, Wilson M II and Wilson T eyeglasses.

products.title: WILSON
products.description: The Wilson has reached cult-status and it's no surprise why. Inspired by John Lennon, these metal Windsor rim sunglasses complement a wide range of styles. For instant shade, pair with the Wilson Clip .

products.title: WINWARD
products.description: An oval silhouette with tapered curves and a tailored fit, constructed from lightweight acetate in contemporary colors for everyday appeal.

products.title: WILSON M
products.description: The refreshed metal version of our bestselling frame in mineral inspired acetates with a minimalist coin edge filigree and adjustable nose pads. For instant shade, pair with the Wilson Clip .

products.title: SOFT CASE
products.description: Standard GLCO soft case available in a range of colors. Comes with a GLCO cleaning cloth. This item is final sale.

products.title: NAPLES
products.description: With rich materials and a bold silhouette, the Naples frame infuses a modern design with vintage sensibility. Palm leaf plaques embellish the exaggerated endpieces for a look that's equal parts minimal and striking. products.title: PALOMA
products.description: A round, lightweight, classic P3 metal frame with interior Windsor rims and a curved, polished bridge.

products.title: MORNINGSIDE
products.description: The Morningside is an oversized round style inspired by Lauren Hutton's iconic look in American Gigolo. The chic, ultra-thin acetate frames come in a range of versatile colorways.

products.title: ROKU C
products.description: Roku C's unique titanium and acetate construction includes distinctive vintage-inspired ornamental patterns along the bridge and end pieces, as well as exposed coil temples designed for added flexibility. Specially tooled enamel coated titanium nose pads provide a smoother finish and better fit.

products.title: KINNEY CLIP
products.description: A folding sunglass clip created for the Kinney, available in both sizes. Frame sold separately. Pair with Kinney eyeglasses.

products.title: HOWLAND
products.description: A classic rectangular optical frame for men in a sweet spot size with balanced proportions and thicker temples in traditionally popular acetates.

products.title: MARMONT C
products.description: The Chateau Marmont is a Hollywood landmark on Sunset Boulevard long frequented by film stars and rock stars. Its storied register of immortal guests has inspired a rich mythology around the hotel and inspired innumerable songs, films and works of literature. The frame's design was inspired by classic silhouettes and the acetate styles of Old Hollywood. Its timeless P3 shape and titanium construct

products.title: HANALEI C
products.description: Suitable for the likes of Andy Warhol, the Hanalei is a tribute to the ‘60s mod optical shape that is now universally iconic, the bold silhouette of choice for intellectual, creative world travelers then and now.

products.title: CLUNE CLIP
products.description: A folding sunglass clip created for the Clune, available in two sizes. Frame sold separately. Pair with Clune eyeglasses.

products.title: CLUNE SUN
products.description: Clune is a modern take on the classic P3 silhouette, with a distinctive round shape and lightweight acetate construction. Features 100% UV protection.

products.title: CLARK
products.description: A favorite optical design, Clark takes a back-to-basics approach with balanced proportions, a keyhole bridge, and slim temples.

products.title: CLUNE
products.description: Clune is a modern take on the classic P3 silhouette, with a distinctive round shape and lightweight acetate construction. For instant shade, pair with the Clune Clip .

products.title: CLIP CASE
products.description: Standard GLCO Clip Case in brown. This item is final sale.

products.title: BOON
products.description: The Boon is a traditional wide, rectangular style eyeglass with semi-rounded rims. These classic frames feature a thin acetate, keyhole bridge for considered comfort, and signature GLCO pins. For instant shade, pair with the Boon Clip

products.title: BROOKS
products.description: A best-selling style since its debut in our very first collection, Brooks features a square-shaped silhouette with classic proportions and a defined keyhole bridge.

products.title: ACE SUN
products.description: With bold lines and fine details, the Ace is for the strong and not-so-silent types. Featuring a palm leaf plaque adorning the frame front and glass lenses for unmatched clarity, the Ace is a striking choice for the discerning wearer. Appearances matter, and no one lives this better than the wearer of the Ace. Assured and well-connected, he's the guy who always gets it right.

products.title: GLCO ANTI-FOG SPRAY
products.description: Whether from wearing face masks or drinking hot beverages, every glasses wearer knows the struggle of lenses fogging up. Keep your glasses clear with the ZEISS Fog Defender System—an anti-fog spray that prevents your lenses from fogging up for up to 72 hours. Simply spray the solution onto the lenses and wipe dry with the included cloth.

products.title: KEEP IT FRESH KIT
products.description: GL Keep It Fresh Kit

products.title: HAMPTON
products.description: The very first frame we ever designed, Hampton continues to be as relevant today as it was when it debuted in 2010. A classic P3 shape lends timeless appeal while contemporary acetates give it a modern edge. For instant shade, pair with the Hampton Clip .

products.title: KINNEY SUN
products.description: One of our most recognizable and iconic frames, Kinney Sun is an enduring style with balanced proportions suited to fit and flatter both men and women. A defined keyhole bridge lends classic appeal, while soft curves offer wearability to the square-shaped frame.

products.title: HAMPTON SUN
products.description: From our original collection 10 years ago, Hampton Sun continues to be one of our best-selling styles for both men and women, striking the perfect balance of casual and refined. The frame sports a retro-inspired P3 silhouette for a classic look, while contemporary color combinations lend it a fresh, modern feel. Featuring Premium Glass lenses and 100% UV protection.
